initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['delegate']
Prompt family: delegate
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Decompose the problem into a maximum of 2 highly focused, non-overlapping subproblems. Instead of focusing on processing specific input values, focus on the algorithmic design required to solve the general class of this problem. Each helper should be assigned a single, specific task related to identifying the necessary logical steps, data structures, or mathematical properties required to construct a general solution. Ensure the total number of helpers requested does not exceed 2.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "delegate",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "helpers": [
    {
      "label": "helper_1",
      "instructions": "plain-text subproblem for the first helper"
    }
  ],
  "synthesis_brief": "how the parent should combine the child results"
}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-B2-usaco-2023-us-open-gold-tree-merging
Title: B2. USACO 2023 US Open Gold / Tree Merging

Problem:
Reconstruct a valid sequence of sibling-merge operations that transforms an initial rooted tree into a final rooted tree.

Grading target:
Binary hidden-test acceptance.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
final_prompt:

User prompt:
Child results have already come back to you. Use them to produce the final response yourself. Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "string",
  "result_type": "optional string"

Synthesis brief from the earlier child-creation step:
The parent will take the set of required merge operations from the structural analysis helper and use the ordering logic from the sequence reconstruction helper to produce the final valid sequence of operations.

Child results already returned to you:
[
  {
    "node_id": "node_root_helper_01",
    "summary": "FINAL_ANSWER: Undetermined\nJUSTIFICATION: No initial or final tree structures were provided."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "node_root_helper_02",
    "summary": "FINAL_ANSWER: Topological sort on a dependency graph of merge operations.\nJUSTIFICATION: Dependency graph ensures nodes exist and siblings are available."
  }
]
